# Soham Kamat Portfolio

Portfolio of Soham Kamat, an AI and Data Science undergraduate building machine learning systems, data products, and intelligent web applications.

## Primary links

- [Portfolio home](/)
- [Resume](/Soham_Kamat_Resume.pdf)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sohamkamat28)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sohamkamat28/)

## Featured work

- ResumeLens ATS: AI-assisted resume and job-description analysis.
- MedSimplify: OCR and biomedical NLP for readable medical reports.
- StockSense: explainable stock-direction modeling.
- Spotify Analytics: interactive music-data exploration.
